home.intro: One image, two images, a sequence of light and shadow. Clinging to what is filmed or peeling away from it. All subjectivity: I paint them, twist them, knead them, loosen them from their starched embrace.
home.subtitle: Portal to the marvellous

projects.title: Projects
introBody: Making-ofs and stills from set were my first steps and teachers in the world of video and film.
Then came more personal creations, essays, collaborations with visual artists.
Then the need to express my own inner world through writing screenplays and directing them.
Today I am writing a short-film screenplay and a series set in the art world, and I hope to keep working with my team of collaborators and artists to make ambitious dreams real.
